name: Oven Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook eggplant in boiling water, covered, for 10 minutes.
2. Drain and cut the eggplant in half lengthwise. Scoop out the insides, leaving about half an inch of the shell intact.
3. Mash the scooped-out insides with cottage cheese, onion, bay leaf, basil, oregano, and tomato sauce.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Stuff the eggplant halves with the mixture, place them in a casserole dish, and bake covered for 15 minutes.
6. Add a little water to the bottom of the pan to keep the eggplant moist. Top each half with provolone cheese.
7. Bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes.
1 serving ò44C, 2 meat, 1 bread, 2 veg Protein 10gm, fat 4gm, carbo 10 gm From "Vegetarian Cooking for Diabetics"
